name: auditTicketGaps
description: Verifica lacunas de tickets por período
code:
SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TICKETS WHERE CRIADO_EM >= '{{dataInicio}}' AND CRIADO_EM <= '{{dataFim}}') AS TOTAL_PERIODO,
        (SELECT MIN(ID) FROM TICKETS WHERE CRIADO_EM >= '{{dataInicio}}' AND CRIADO_EM <= '{{dataFim}}') AS MIN_ID,
        (SELECT MAX(ID) FROM TICKETS WHERE CRIADO_EM >= '{{dataInicio}}' AND CRIADO_EM <= '{{dataFim}}') AS MAX_ID,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OWNER_NOME) FROM TICKETS WHERE CRIADO_EM >= '{{dataInicio}}' AND CRIADO_EM <= '{{dataFim}}') AS ANALISTAS_DISTINTOS,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CATEGORIA) FROM TICKETS WHERE CRIADO_EM >= '{{dataInicio}}' AND CRIADO_EM <= '{{dataFim}}') AS CATEGORIAS_DISTINTAS
